title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical API surface to the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; supports multi-user, file uploads, RAG, and plugins.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom component that exposes Ollama models as conversation agents for local smart-home AI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers + Chroma.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for the Ollama REST API offering synchronous and asynchronous clients plus native SSE parsing.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing Ollama chat endpoints, admin UI, and Django-Channels WebSocket streaming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate that wraps the Ollama REST API with strong typing, streaming, and tokio async runtime.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama supporting chat, generate, embed, list, pull, and delete operations.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-Mode to answer questions with Ollama models without exposing public endpoints.

title: ollama-macos-swiftui
summary: Native macOS SwiftUI menu-bar app for chatting with Ollama models offline; supports drag-and-drop files and markdown.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered AI commands: summarize, rewrite, translate, and custom prompts inside notes.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Async Python bot bringing Ollama models to Telegram chats with group whitelist, session memory, and voice reply.

title: ollama-k8s-operator
summary: Kubernetes operator that manages Ollama instances and model caches across namespaces with CRD-driven lifecycle.
